eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bonneville; Caribou; Teton; Jefferson; Bingham; Madison, ID; at 07:53 PM ON APR 9, 2026 Effective until 09:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system. The Idaho Falls Police Department is looking for a missing person Colton McMinn who was last seen April 3rd in Idaho Falls and is believed to be in danger. He is a 20-year-old white male with brown hair and brown eyes 5ft 10 inches tall 150lbs and has a neck tattoo. Colton is currently homeless. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact Idaho Falls Police Department at (208) 529-1200  or 9  1  1 immediately.
